purpose: Classify every non-carded AP/A-level/formulary hook by why it is not yet a v0 static attachment card.

route_classes.static_quadratic_next: Likely direct card after coordinate/units cleanup.
route_classes.local_quadratic: Needs an operating point, local regime, or local expansion.
route_classes.dynamic_evidence: Needs time-series, likelihood, Fisher, or state-space evidence layer.
route_classes.sensor_or_observer_map: Measurement or observer map before it is a module object.
route_classes.finite_weighted_family: Needs finite basis/truncation or supplied observer/quadratic family.
route_classes.thermodynamic_fluctuation: Needs ensemble, potential, coordinates, and fluctuation/local Hessian convention.
route_classes.support_or_event: Needs support-stratum, branch, restart, or residual-margin route.
route_classes.exact_special_sector: Potentially exact only after a supplied special law sector is declared.
route_classes.parameter_input: Useful physical parameter, not an attachment object alone.
route_classes.true_gap_or_defer: No honest current route without new theory/API or a strategic decision to defer.

items.why_not_static_card: It is a trajectory law over time, not a finite Hessian or precision object.
items.next_proof_obligation: Show that a sampled trajectory with declared noise yields a Fisher/precision object before calling kernel surfaces.

items.why_not_static_card: Centripetal force is a constraint/dynamics relation, not a restoring potential by itself.
items.next_proof_obligation: Supply a local radial potential or estimation objective before extracting a Hessian.

items.why_not_static_card: Collision formulas are event/conservation constraints rather than a standing quadratic object.
items.next_proof_obligation: Encode a finite before/after evidence object or explicitly defer event handling.
items.gap_assessment: likely schema gap in v0 operationalise layer

items.why_not_static_card: Density supplies a parameter for mass matrices; it is not an observer object.
items.next_proof_obligation: Use density only inside a declared kinetic or wave-mode card.

items.why_not_static_card: The exponential decay law is a dynamic response, not a static storage Hessian.
items.next_proof_obligation: Build a minimal time-series Fisher object for tau = RC, or defer until evidence integration.

items.why_not_static_card: Ohm law is dissipative and op-amp equations are gain/observer maps; neither is a stored SPD object alone.
items.next_proof_obligation: Decide whether operationalise v1 admits observer-map cards distinct from Hessian cards.
items.gap_assessment: schema gap, not kernel theorem gap

items.why_not_static_card: Lens equations are ray-transfer/measurement maps, not SPD precision objects.
items.next_proof_obligation: Decide whether to introduce observer-map cards or defer optics.

items.why_not_static_card: Fringe equations are measurement equations unless a field and sensor likelihood are supplied.
items.next_proof_obligation: Create only after evidence/sensor route is explicit.

items.why_not_static_card: The inverse-square potential is not globally SPD; only local sectors may be usable.
items.next_proof_obligation: Compute a local Hessian with signs and support declared; refuse global overclaim.

items.why_not_static_card: Charge signs and operating-point stability decide whether a local positive sector exists.
items.next_proof_obligation: Attach first through capacitor energy, then revisit local Coulomb potentials.
items.gap_assessment: local route exists but should wait

items.why_not_static_card: Lorentz force and induction are dynamic/control relations unless reduced to declared inductor storage.
items.next_proof_obligation: Route inductive storage through LC cards and transformer action through observer-map grammar.

items.why_not_static_card: Flow equations are field/dynamic constraints, not finite SPD objects without discretization.
items.next_proof_obligation: Defer until a minimal finite fluid/acoustic discretization is selected.

items.why_not_static_card: Heat accounting is not curvature until a potential or noise model is declared.
items.next_proof_obligation: Pick either potential-curvature route or lab measurement Fisher route.

items.why_not_static_card: Potentials can yield Hessians, but only after choosing variables and ensemble.
items.next_proof_obligation: Define a thermodynamic attachment micro-schema before carding.

items.why_not_static_card: Rate laws are time-series parameter models, not static energy geometry.
items.next_proof_obligation: Build a minimal Fisher card only after evidence convention exists.

items.why_not_static_card: Equilibrium constants need reaction coordinate, standard state, and potential convention.
items.next_proof_obligation: Do electrochemistry first; it supplies a clearer voltage sensor surface.

items.why_not_static_card: Voltage is measurable, but the free-energy coordinate and fluctuation convention are missing.
items.next_proof_obligation: Define smallest honest reaction-coordinate schema.
items.gap_assessment: best chemistry bridge; not ready for static v0

items.why_not_static_card: Absorbance is a sensor law, not a physical storage Hessian.
items.next_proof_obligation: Use as first chemistry sensor-evidence test after evidence route is chosen.

items.why_not_static_card: These are energy/momentum conversion and threshold relations, not Hessian objects.
items.next_proof_obligation: Use only as measurement transform until an estimation objective is declared.

items.why_not_static_card: Radioactive decay is a stochastic counting process, not static storage geometry.
items.next_proof_obligation: This is a strong future evidence card, but not a v0 static card.

items.why_not_static_card: Radiation laws are distribution/fit models without a finite sensor likelihood.
items.next_proof_obligation: Defer until evidence/fit schema exists.

items.why_not_static_card: The law is a regression relation, not a physical Hessian.
items.next_proof_obligation: Treat as evidence benchmark only.

items.why_not_static_card: Current visible-precision calls are SPD; Lorentzian geometry is indefinite.
items.next_proof_obligation: Do not mix indefinite metric with current SPD calls.
items.gap_assessment: true boundary for current kernel route

items.why_not_static_card: It is quadratic but uses operator/Hilbert or phase-space conventions outside the AP v0 runner.
items.next_proof_obligation: Only after classical oscillator/circuit cards are stable.
